steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “because of his lifetime contributions to the arts” shows that Burns received the fellowship due to merit, signaling that he was selected or chosen for the honor.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: “Chosen” means selected, which fits the signal that he was picked to receive the fellowship. The other three either contradict the idea of being selected or describe a stance not supported by the passage. That matches choice D — D is correct.
